name: My opponent marked everything AEO, is that allowed?
description: **Overuse of AEO is sanctionable; courts require sparing use.** Recent NY case fined Google.[1]

mainEntity.name: My opponent marked everything AEO, is that allowed?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Overuse of AEO is sanctionable; courts require sparing use.** Recent NY case fined Google.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, overuse of AEO designations is not allowed and can result in sanctions.** New York courts have sanctioned parties like Google for excessive AEO use on non-sensitive documents.[1] Key factors: Designations must be 'sparingly' applied; not a litigation tactic. Content must justify restriction. Challenge via motion showing irrelevance. Document your objection and seek court de-designation promptly. Get experienced counsel to avoid counter-sanctions.
